calendar.matters:
First And Final Account And Report Of Trustee And Petition For Order 1 Settling And Approving 1 Account And Report 2 Approving Resignation Of Tru
Off Calendar Apr-08-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stacie Nelson appeared by zoom for The Northern Trust Company.

Mrs. Nelson stated that she has not heard of any objections and that the trustee has already been paid for their fee schedule. The First and Final Account and Report of Trustee, etc., is under submission with the court's intent to accept the accounting as filed. The court will modify the order with respect to the issue of the specific assets that are on hand, and the broad and standard powers.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.
